title: hordeum marinum
intro: Hordeum marinum, also known as sea barley or sea wheat, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hordeum marinum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Hordeum marinum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
